ddls:
CREATE TABLE "characters" (
  "character_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character */,
  "character_class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the character's class */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the character */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the character */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the character */,
  "space" TEXT /* Space occupied by the character */,
  "reach" INTEGER /* Reach of the character */,
  "attack" INTEGER /* Attack value of the character */,
  "damage" INTEGER /* Damage value of the character */,
  "grapple" INTEGER /* Grapple value of the character */,
  "stealth" INTEGER /* Stealth value of the character */,
  "rugged" INTEGER /* Ruggedness value of the character */,
  "str_end" INTEGER /* Strength and Endurance values of the character */,
  "dex_agi" INTEGER /* Dexterity and Agility values of the character */,
  "hp" INTEGER /* Hit points of the character */,
  "mp" INTEGER /* Magic points of the character */,
  "xp" INTEGER /* Experience points of the character */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Level of the character */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the character was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the character was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_characters_character_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_class_id") REFERENCES character_classes ("character_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_classes" (
  "character_class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character class */,
  "character_class_name" TEXT /* Name of the character class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the character class */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the character class was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the character class was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "combat_moves" (
  "combat_move_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each combat move */,
  "combat_move_name" TEXT /* Name of the combat move */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the combat move */,
  "damage_value" INTEGER /* Damage value of the combat move */,
  "mana_cost" INTEGER /* Mana cost of the combat move */,
  "cooldown" INTEGER /* Cooldown of the combat move */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the combat move was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the combat move was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("combat_move_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_combat_moves" (
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character */,
  "combat_move_id" INTEGER /* ID of the combat move */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the character learned the combat move */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the character's combat move was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_id", "combat_move_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quests" (
  "quest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quest */,
  "quest_name" TEXT /* Name of the quest */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the quest */,
  "difficulty_level" INTEGER /* Difficulty level of the quest */,
  "reward" TEXT /* Reward for completing the quest */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the quest was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the quest was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quests_characters" (
  "quest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the quest */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character */,
  "completed_date" TEXT /* Date when the character completed the quest */,
  "reward_claimed" INTEGER /* Whether the character has claimed the reward */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quest_id", "character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "combat_statistics" (
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses */,
  "draws" INTEGER /* Number of draws */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the character's combat statistics were created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the character's combat statistics were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "opponents" (
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each opponent */,
  "opponent_name" TEXT /* Name of the opponent */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the opponent */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the opponent was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the opponent was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("opponent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "battles" (
  "battle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each battle */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opponent */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the battle (win, loss, draw) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the battle was fought */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the battle was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("battle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_battles_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES opponents ("opponent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_battles_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., game developer, game master, player) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the user accessed the game */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the access log was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "session_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the game session started */,
  "session_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the game session ended */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the game session was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the game session was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_progression" (
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Level of the character */,
  "xp" INTEGER /* Experience points of the character */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the character's progression was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the character's progression was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the item */,
  "item_type" TEXT /* Type of the item (e.g., sword, shield, potion) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the item was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the item was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_items" (
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item owned by the character */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the character acquired the item */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the character's item was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_id", "item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "guilds" (
  "guild_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each guild */,
  "guild_name" TEXT /* Name of the guild */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the guild */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the guild was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the guild was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("guild_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_guilds" (
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character */,
  "guild_id" INTEGER /* ID of the guild */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the character in the guild (e.g., leader, member) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the character joined the guild */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the character's guild membership was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_id", "guild_id")
)
